name_cn:
Model 26358, Beige, Medium
M26359 Dark Brown M26358 Beige M26397 Ebony
This Express medium handbag features soft calfskin leather, effortlessly pairing with various urban looks. Inspired by the classic Keepall bag, it draws essence from the Louis Vuitton archives, featuring Monogram trim and lining to meet the fast-paced needs of modern city dwellers. The iconic key pouch and padlock decoration offer multiple carrying options.
24 x 18.5 x 36 cm
(H x W x D)
